skill_description: Whole-division starter rules for CSI Division 07 - Thermal and Moisture Protection. Use when starting, triaging, validating, or packaging a commercial roofing, waterproofing, insulation, firestopping, or sealants bid.
scope_rule: Base bid is limited to CSI Division 07 - Thermal and Moisture Protection work specifically assigned to the bidder: waterproofing, insulation, air barriers, roofing, flashing, sheet metal, firestopping, joint protection, and sealants. Structural deck, framing, roof drains, interior finishes, and MEP penetrations must be explicitly included, excluded, or flagged before pricing.
proposal_exclusions: structural roof deck by others unless listed
roof drains and overflow piping by others unless listed
